"[29] CORR***A123-203 VIA LL-- CHK'D 2 1/2 MI JNO ADDR AND UTL ON ANYTHING OVER TEH SIDE // CHK'D GLENDORA RIDGE RD ALSO UTL // JSO ADDR HAS HEAVY FOG, LOW VISIBILITY AND LOTS OF KRAIL // INQ IF AIROPS CAN DO FLYOVER LATER AND ADV -- 98"
"[28] CHK'D 2 1/2 MILES - UTL // ALSO GLENDORA RIDGE RD AND UTL -- AND JSO ADDR LOTS OF KRAIL AND"
"[23] 1039 IN AIROPS WILL ADV DUE TO WEATHER "
"[22] Incident 260628IN0026 was reopened. Comment: Incident Reopened : 123-203 LOG REOPENED SO A WATCH CAN ATL GOOD SAMS and LOOK FOR VEH"
"[21] 123-203 BOTH PTYS MOD INJ "
"[18] 29 CLR 07 CHEV UT OO VALENCIA // RP ADVS VEH IS GRY CHEV CAM"
"[9] CORR LINE 3 BY STANDERS PICKED UP THE INV PTYS NEAR THE SWITCH BACKS-- UNK WHERE TC OCCD "
"[8] UNK VEH DESC "
"[7] VEH FLEW OFF THE ROAD AND INVS HIKED UP TO THE ROAD FOR HELP - NO CALLS INTO 911 // NEG CALL HISTORY"
"[6] ADV 1 MORE VEH POSS INV - WAS UNABLE TO LOCATE "
"[4] OCCUPANTS DONT REMEMBER THE TC "
"[3] ADV TC OCCD SOMWHERE ON MT BALDY NEAR SWITCHBACKS"
"[1] SBSO LL ADV SAN ANTONIO ON LL ADV A TC OCCD A FEW HRS AGO VEH FLEW OFF THR SIDE OF THE ROAD "
